rightValue.stringValue: Recycled - Not Interested - Time of Year
Recycled - Not Interested - Hung Up on Multiple Times

Flow.description: When a leads outreach stage is marked as REC or UNQ, sets OMQ return date and updates the stage and owner to OMQ. JH 8/18/23 updated to incorporate new outreach stage REC - Not yet qualified 5/7/25 - BW - Updated to run at time of REC or UNQ with the removal of Final Disposition 11/04/2025 - LK - Exclude TaskSubtype = Cadence from the Auto Close Tasks 02/25/2026- VB- Removed "Inactive Lead" field reference from the flow
Flow.label: RLA - Lead - Resting Period Assignment
